div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

title.value: Breast Cancer Screening and Management (BCSM) Clinical Decision Support (CDS) Implementation Guide

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: Resources related to ScreeningEligible flow
Resources related to DecisionToScreen flow
Resources related to HighRiskExclusions flow
Resources related to SpecialPopulations flow
Resources related to AverageRisk flow
Average risk logic path.

name.value: Breast Screening Next Due Record Inference Task

description.value: This ActivityDefinition generates a RecordInferenceTask for screening study next due.
This ActivityDefinition generates a ServiceRequest for screening study.
This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.
This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.
This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending risk assessment.

name.value: Communicate Recommendation to refer to specialist

description.value: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending specialty referral.

name.value: Communicate Shared Decision Making to Continue Screening

description.value: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending shared decision making on the decision to continue screening.

name.value: Communicate Shared Decision Making to Delay Screening

description.value: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending shared decision making on the decision to delay screening.
Decision to screen logic path.
High risk exclusions logic path.
Code representing plan definition action codes
This value set includes action codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

name.value: Plan Definition Action Reason Code System

description.value: Code representing plan definition action reason codes
This value set includes action reason codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.
Primary Screening Decision pathway.
Screening eligible logic path.
This ActivityDefinition generates a Questionnaire Task containing a request to complete a questionnaire.
Code representing breast cancer screening related observations
Special populations logic path.
